tools.name: interpret_labs
tools.description: Interpret a panel of lab values against ACLM-optimized reference ranges. Returns risk classification per marker, lifestyle interventions, and medication deprescription signals.

tools.name: marker_reference
tools.description: Look up the ACLM-optimized reference range and lifestyle intervention plan for a single biomarker (e.g., apob, lp_a, hscrp, hba1c, fasting_insulin, vitamin_d).
